name: Broken Link Finder Pro
description: Professional link auditing tool — scan, classify, and fix broken links on any webpage.
author: Broken Link Finder Pro

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:; font-src 'self'; connect-src https: http:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none';
